content:
There's another issue we've encountered. At times the Russian text is too long to display properly, and it basically cuts off some important details without a possibility to scroll through it.

On the screen: "Complete Phantasmal Div", so "e 3 times to claim the reward, 0/3" got cut.

As such, people don't get that the Dive has to be completed thrice and are confused. And there are similar issues.

<@1376763322568937562> is there a technical possibility to make any bit of text that doesn't fit scroll under the cursor?
